title: Coryphopteris platyptera
taxonomy: Coryphopteris platyptera is classified within the family Dryopteridaceae, a group of ferns commonly known as the wood ferns or glade ferns. This classification places Coryphopteris platyptera among the ferns that have a more terrestrial lifestyle, often found in shaded areas with moist soils. As a member of the Dryopteridaceae family, Coryphopteris platyptera shares characteristics with other fern species, such as the presence of fronds and a rhizomatous growth habit. At the genus level, Coryphopteris platyptera is part of a group of ferns that are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. The exact classification of Coryphopteris platyptera at the species level may require further research to confirm its precise placement within the plant kingdom.
